author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: fix(sffv): unwrap content when it comes from multi queries (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#574)
body:
* fix(sffv): unwrap content when it comes from multi queries
* fix(pendingSeach): mock client.sffv instead of initIndex.sffv
* refactor(sffv): use Array.isArray instead of _.isArray
